[Sansa](wiki:Sansa_Stark) stays in her room in [Maegor’s Holdfast](wiki:Red_Keep), sleeping, sobbing, and sleeping again. She does not eat the food the servants bring. When she dreams, she relives...

Sansa believes she will be executed and the thought does not bother her; she knows songs will be sung about her. She even considers throwing herself from her window, but cannot summon the courage and...

She is alone on the balcony as Joffrey dispenses what he considers justice. Mostly he lets his [small council](wiki:Small_council) make the decisions, but when he intervenes he will not be dissuaded....
